name: Sun Shield
description: It's a well-known fact that the Brotherhood of Truth's Eternal Sun favors the pursuit of Knowledge over prayers and martial training. And yet, it doesn't affect the Brotherhood knights' combat readiness in the slightest: if anything, their study of the world's secrets fills them with incredible zeal on the battlefield.
descriptionZh: 众所周知，相较祷告与习武，真理永恒之日兄弟会更为热衷求知。话虽如此，他们的骑士毫不畏惧战斗，随时可以上场作战。他们正是因为不懈研习世界的奥秘，才能够在战场上展现出非凡的激情。
